promoted_facts.fact: Referral fee of $20,000 paid to existing subfranchisor who refers a new territory buyer
Client Bid minimum schedule varies by Area population: ≤1M=15/20/25 per month; 1-3M=20/30/40; ≥3M=30/45/60 (yr1/yr2/yr3+)
FDD maintenance failure is a non-curable termination trigger (no cure opportunity) per Section 2.6 of Subfranchise Rights Agreement
promoted_facts.source_reader_report: Not in reader report — found during A2 contract walk

promoted_facts.fact: Unintentional client payment deposited to wrong account constitutes immediate default per Section 2.4(d)
promoted_facts.source_reader_report: Not in reader report — found during A2 contract walk

promoted_facts.fact: Territory reduction triggered by 3 defaults in 12 months or 2 defaults in 6 months (Section 1.3)
promoted_facts.source_reader_report: Pass D mentioned territory reduction for bid schedule failure

promoted_facts.fact: Non-compete 24-month clock restarts from date franchisee begins to comply if initially fails to comply (Section 10.2(b))
promoted_facts.source_reader_report: Pass E captured 24-month non-compete but not restart provision

promoted_facts.fact: Franchisor is explicit third-party beneficiary of all Unit Franchise Agreements with independent enforcement rights (Section 2.5(d))
Daily deposit of all client payments into Anago Escrow Account required (Section 2.4(b))
promoted_facts.source_reader_report: Pass C mentioned escrow model but not daily deposit requirement
